name: WiFi Watchtower
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or refine the WiFi Watchtower macOS menu bar app in `apps/wifi-watchtower`. Use when Codex needs the exact app workspace, repo-native doctor/typecheck/build/test flows, or menu bar and dashboard changes for local Wi-Fi trust scoring.
short_description: Native Wi-Fi trust scoring menu bar app
audience: Mac users who want a compact local Wi-Fi trust readout
Builders refining native menu-bar network safety surfaces
Teams keeping native Wi-Fi scoring separate from portable SwiftBar network monitoring
detail_lines: Owns the native MenuBarExtra app for current-network trust grades, nearby Wi-Fi risk context, and dashboard explanations.
Keeps current-network trust, nearby-network context, and recommendation copy separate so the UI stays honest about uncertainty.
Uses local Wi-Fi inspection only, with no remote telemetry, account-bound sync, packet-sniffing claims, or hidden network calls.
